description: Master topic map for NurseNest content production. Each topic is one lesson unit (5 canonical sections + pre/post tests in pipeline). IDs are stable slugs for SEO and linking.
qualityRules: Prioritize exam decisions: what to assess first, what to delegate, what to escalate.
Every lesson must name common distractors / traps the NCLEX uses.
No fluff or generic nursing-school overview; tutor-in-the-room tone.
